title: Meta Ad Library Video Analyzer
description: AI-powered video ad analysis. Paste a brand's Ad Library link, choose how many videos, and get full persuasion intelligence.

brandInput.title: Brand Ad Library Link or Name
brandInput.description: Paste the brand's Meta Ad Library page URL. Example: https://www.facebook.com/ads/library/?active_status=active&ad_type=all&country=US&view_all_page_id=108824890903484 — You can also enter just the brand name, but the direct link is more reliable.

numberOfVideos.title: Number of videos to analyze
numberOfVideos.description: How many video ads to analyze from this brand. The most recent videos are selected first.

analysisDepth.title: Analysis depth
analysisDepth.description: Standard is fast and cost-effective. Deep adds adversarial validation to catch contradictions and unsupported claims.
analysisDepth.sectionDescription: Configure the depth and scope of your analysis.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential proxies are auto-configured by default. Only change this if you have specific proxy needs.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: Proxy and network settings. Residential proxies are used automatically — most users can skip this.
